# C26 Aquatics

> C26 Aquatics is a competitive swim team based in the Kansas City metro, home pool at Bluhawk in south Overland Park, KS. One pool, one coaching staff, one standard — USA Swimming–registered training groups from developmental to elite, serving families across Leawood, Lenexa, Olathe, Overland Park, Prairie Village, and Shawnee.

## Pages

- [Home](https://c26aquatics.com/): Overview of the competitive team, coaching staff, core values, service area, and quick answers to common questions.
- [Team](https://c26aquatics.com/team/): The competitive swim team — training groups by age and ability, evaluations and placement, meet schedule, and how to join.
- [Coaches](https://c26aquatics.com/coaches/): Full coaching roster with credentials, including USA Swimming registration.
- [Our Story](https://c26aquatics.com/our-story/): Why C26 exists — founder Robbie Bruce on building a team where every swimmer is known, coached, and developed as an individual.
- [Our Approach](https://c26aquatics.com/our-approach/): How C26 develops swimmers — purposeful, periodized training, long-term athlete development, a single home pool, and the Midwest's premier open water program.
- [FAQ](https://c26aquatics.com/faq/): Frequently asked questions about evaluations, meets, fees, time commitment, and logistics.

## How to join

New swimmers start with a team evaluation and placement. Every "Join the Team" link on the site goes to the external booking system (Momence).
